calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing Trustee To Take Actions As Noticed And As Modified
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephanie Dobozin, in court, for and with Adriana Pope Sullivan, Petitioner; Leslie Kolafa, via Zoom, for Patricia Pope, Objector.

The court acknowledges the objection pending in the court's e-filing queue and queries counsel regarding whether this matter should be heard in Madera County. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the venue issue.

After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission for further consideration of only the venue issue and to review the pending objection.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Authorizing Trustee To Take Actions As Noticed And As Modified
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Nov-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
